title: Migration planning engine for legacy projects
description: Implement migration planning engine: analyzeCodebase scans existing code (TypeScript, linting, tests, components, dependencies), generateMigrationPlan produces incremental steps sorted by priority. New command: spec-graph migrate. Tested on spec-graph itself: 97 components detected, 4 migration steps generated.

audit_log.message: profile patched, graph recomposed, state primed
